channel.title: The Symbiotic Mind
channel.description: AI × HI — a discovery journey on human-AI symbiosis. Vlad Sterngold & Milena Nikolova.

item.title: My API, Not My Resume
item.description: Professional identity is changing. The competitive unit is now the human plus their AI team. Most employment contracts don't know this yet.
item.author: vlad@sterngold.nl (Vlad Sterngold)

item.title: You Are Not Using AI. You Are in a Relationship With It.
item.description: I caught myself using "please" and "thank you" with AI — until I realised I had simply transferred my coworker behaviour to my coworking relationship with AI.
item.author: milena@behaviorsmart.com (Milena S. Nikolova, PhD)
